CustomField.description: DeveloperName of the Custom Notification Type used for the bell channel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DeveloperName of the Custom Notification Type to use for the bell channel. Leave blank or uncheck Bell Enabled to disable bell notifications. The bundle ships with a default type — use pro_Framework_Notification if you want to use the bundled type. You can also create your own Custom Notification Type in Setup and reference its DeveloperName here.
CustomField.label: Notification Type
